description_long: This rifle features a robust, tactical design with a predominantly matte olive-green finish accented by orange bands near the barrel and rear. The body is constructed with a combination of metal and polymer, giving it a modern, military-grade appearance. It has a bullpup configuration, with the magazine and action located behind the trigger, resulting in a compact yet powerful form factor. The rifle includes a prominent top rail for mounting optics, and a fixed, integrated sight system is visible. The grip and trigger assembly are ergonomically shaped, and the barrel is short and thick, suggesting a design optimized for urban combat scenarios. The overall build is solid and utilitarian, with minimal decorative elements and a focus on functionality.
description: A compact, bullpup-style tactical rifle with an olive-green and orange color scheme, featuring a thick barrel and integrated sight system. Its robust, utilitarian design is suited for urban combat environments.
description_view_0: Front view showing the thick barrel opening and the integrated sight above the muzzle.
description_view_1: Side profile highlighting the bullpup configuration, top rail, and ergonomic grip.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the orange band at the back and the compact stock area.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile, mirroring the bullpup layout and showing additional details of the receiver and grip.
